top_findings.summary: The skill automatically passes the current working directory as part of its critique process, which may not be necessary for analyzing user-provided questions or code snippets, especially for text-based queries, leading to unnecessary exposure of local file system data beyond the scope of the stated purpose of critiquing content.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill automatically passes the current working directory as part of its critique process, which may not be necessary for analyzing user-provided questions or code snippets, especially for text-based queries, leading to unnecessary exposure of local file system data beyond the scope of the stated purpose of critiquing content.
